mapper.select: SELECT l.log_number AS logNumber, l.log_title AS logTitle, l.log_date AS logDate, u.user_id AS userId, u.user_nickname AS userNickname FROM ddd_log l JOIN ddd_user u ON l.user_number = u.user_number ORDER BY l.log_date DESC

SELECT l.log_number AS logNumber, l.log_title AS logTitle, l.log_date AS logDate, u.user_id AS userId, u.user_nickname AS userNickname FROM ddd_log l JOIN ddd_user u ON l.user_number = u.user_number
u.user_id LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
u.user_nickname LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
ORDER BY l.log_date DESC

SELECT l.log_number AS logNumber, l.user_number AS userNumber, u.user_id AS userId, u.user_nickname AS userNickname, l.log_title AS logTitle, l.log_post AS logPost, l.log_date AS logDate FROM ddd_log l JOIN ddd_user u ON l.user_number = u.user_number WHERE l.log_number = #{value}

SELECT log_img_number AS logImgNumber, log_number AS logNumber, log_img_name AS logImgName, log_img_path AS logImgPath FROM ddd_log_img WHERE log_number = #{value} AND log_img_number = ( SELECT MIN(log_img_number) FROM ddd_log_img WHERE log_number = #{value} )

SELECT c.comment_number AS commentNumber, c.log_number AS logNumber, c.user_number AS userNumber, u.user_id AS userId, u.user_nickname AS userNickname, c.comment_post AS commentPost, c.comment_date AS commentDate FROM ddd_log_comment c JOIN ddd_user u ON c.user_number = u.user_number WHERE c.log_number = #{value} ORDER BY c.comment_date ASC
